cycles_used.description: How many cycles the run used.

lessons.description: Up to 5 concise TASK-AGNOSTIC lessons. Generalize specifics into reusable patterns.

actor_prompt_rewrite.description: Full new actor system prompt. PRESERVE two-tier structure: generic rules + app-specific sections. NEVER delete app sections unless PROVEN WRONG. Distill and improve.

planner_prompt_rewrite.description: Full new planner system prompt. PRESERVE two-tier structure: generic rules + app-specific sections. NEVER delete app sections unless PROVEN WRONG. Distill and improve.

actor_schema_rewrite.description: Full new actor_schema.json if format needs change. Empty string if no change. Must keep 'actions' and 'expand_data' array fields.

planner_schema_rewrite.description: Full new planner_schema.json if format needs change. Empty string if no change. Must keep 'expand_windows', 'expand_data', 'done_so_far', 'next_step' fields.

patterns_that_worked.description: Action patterns that succeeded. Phrase generically for reuse.

patterns_that_failed.description: Action patterns that failed or caused loops. Phrase generically for reuse.
